name: Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornmeal and cold water; mix well.
2. Add 1/2 teaspoon of salt to the boiling water.
3. Slowly add the cornmeal/cold water mixture to the boiling water, stirring constantly. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, partially cover the pan, and cook slowly for about 7 minutes, stirring often.
5. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish. Line the bottom and sides with the hot cooked mush.
6. Fry the beef and onion in a frying pan until brown and well crumbled; drain off excess grease.
7. Stir in flour, remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt, and chili powder.
8. Add the tomatoes, breaking them up into chunks.
9. Stir in the tomato sauce and corn.
10. Spoon into the mush-lined casserole.
11. Bake at 350°F until hot and bubbly, about 40-45 minutes.
